title: Significance of First Dragons in LoL.
description: Project about the significance of first dragon in the game League of Legends for game result and a predictive model on who kills first baron.

title: GMTK Game Jam 2025
description: (Loop Theme) Helped make a game simulating the choices of a 9-5 worker, playing minigames that proceed to different narrative endings.
